raw_consumer_statement:
The company replied to my previous complaint XXXX with a factually incorrect statement. They also sent me a letter, Your Citi Inquiry - XXXX, with the same incorrect ( or deliberately misstated ) information on XX/XX/year>. I responded the next day, pointing out what was incorrect in their response, and providing, once again, the evidence for their initial discount promise. I have received no response, and no action has been taken. 

To quote my response, " The company responded with the information that was factually wrong. 1 ) the response contains the wrong price of the product ( {$990.00} was never the amount advertised by XXXX XXXX ) 2 ) a discount applied ( {$170.00} ) after the wrong delivery had nothing to do with the issue in hand 3 ) The ad contained the promise of {$100.00} discount when the purchase was {$300.00} or more ( and not XXXX as claimed by the company ) So the company managed to lie 3 times in a single response! ''
